title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that AI is already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must accept the existence of intelligent non-human species alongside AI systems.
